name: airflow-admin-pp-mcp
description: Read-first Apache Airflow operations surface for DAG inventory, DAG run history, task instance inspection, pool capacity, metadata sync, search, and runtime health checks.

airflow_admin_base_url.title: AIRFLOW_ADMIN_BASE_URL
airflow_admin_base_url.description: Airflow webserver/API base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8080 when omitted.

airflow_admin_bearer_auth.title: AIRFLOW_ADMIN_BEARER_AUTH
airflow_admin_bearer_auth.description: Airflow JWT access token without the Bearer prefix.
